scripts.verify:dist: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['dist/main/index.html','dist/math03/index.html']; const missing=required.filter(p=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing build outputs: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1)} console.log('Verified outputs: '+required.join(', '))"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:main && npm run build:math03 && npm run clean:redirects
scripts.build:render: npm install --no-save @oxc-parser/binding-linux-x64-gnu@0.124.0 && npm run build:all && npm run verify:dist
scripts.serve: npm run build:all && npx serve dist -p 3030
